GenAiFunction.description: Establishes the coaching context for the current user by identifying the logged-in agent and determining whether they are in Onboarding or Cruise Control mode based on tenure. This enables Coachforce to dynamically adapt coaching behavior—providing structured guidance for new agents and trend-based coaching for experienced agents—while simplifying integration with Agentforce actions.
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: Coachforce: Get User Id and Mode
